parameters.query:
select 
        s.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_salarie
       ,s.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_salarie
       ,s.XSAL_0 as code_x3_salarie
       , p.YNUM_0 as code_poste_salarie
       , p.YTIT_0 as intitule_poste_salarie
       , s.YTELE_0 as numero_tele_salarie
       , s.XEMAIL_0 as email_salarie
       , ss.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_superieur
       , ss.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_superieur
       , ss.XEMAIL_0 as email_superieur
       , ss.YTELE_0 as numero_tele_salarie
       ,  (SELECT res.XNAMSAL_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL res WHERE res.XSAL_0 = 'S0331') AS nom_responsable_rh
       ,  (SELECT res.XPRENOM_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL res WHERE res.XSAL_0 = 'S0331') AS prenom_responsable_rh
       ,  (SELECT res.XEMAIL_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL res WHERE res.XSAL_0 = 'S0331') AS email_responsable_rh
       ,    -- ─── INFOS IA – SALARIÉ ───
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,

    -- ─── INFOS IA – SUPÉRIEUR ───
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = ss.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = ss.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = ss.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

    -- ─── INFOS IA – RES ───

    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = 'S0331') AS chat_id_responsable,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = 'S0331') AS bot_responsable,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0   FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf where inf.XSAL_0='S0331') AS langue_responsable
    from jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s
    left join jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p 
        on p.YNUM_0=s.ZPOSTE_0
    left join jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL ss
        on ss.XSAL_0=s.YSUP_0



where s.XSAL_0 = '{{ $json.sourceData.query.Salarie }}'
